# Soul Design - LLM Reference Guide

Soul Design is a bespoke boutique creative studio run by Alex Rudyová, blending vibe coding, graphic design, ad campaigns, and creative online support.

## Pages & Structure
- Home (`/`): Core landing page. Main benefits, services outline, timeline process, testimonials slider, profile, and email form.
- Services (`/sluzby`): Detailed listing of web development, graphics, social ads, and AI content.
- About (`/omne`): Backstage details, bio of Alex Rudyová, and client-centric philosophy.
- Testimonials (`/referencie`): Full authentic client feedback reviews.
- Pricing (`/cennik`): Detailed services packages.
- Contact (`/kontakt`): Interactive glassmorphic consultation and contact forms.

## Design System & Tokens
- Primary Accent: `#007599` (Deep Teal)
- Secondary Light: `#E9F3F6` (Ice Blue)
- Base Background: Warm soft ivory (`#FAF8F5`) transitioning to `#FCF9F5`.
- Text Color: `#333333`
- Accent Font Script: Cormorant Garamond Italic (used exclusively for signature details and small overlays)
- Primary Font: Frank Ruhl Libre (Headings) & Lora (Body)
